race.description: Craig & Toni The Pinnacle Maiden Plate
race.comment: SPINIFEX DJON'S (15) showed pace and boxed on well to hold third on debut over 800m at Ipswich last start. Likely improver with that run under the belt and this looks a nice race for her. OLIVONI (13) started at $1.65 on debut recently at Ipswich and looked home after leading but was bloused late. Coming back to 1000m is ideal. Great chance to repay supporters although the early odds on offer are prohibitive. JOLAYNA DASH (16) is first-up since finishing seventh on debut in the Listed Phelan Ready at Doomben in early December. Trialled well recently and will be hard to beat in this easier assignment. AURIC STAR (6) is a half-sister to Group 3 winner Bring The Ransom on debut for Matthew Dunn. Two trial placings suggest she has her share of ability. JOHNNY THE FOX (3) is a Nicconi colt on debut for the Peter Robl stable. The latest trial at Beaudesert was encouraging.
